title: Always Channel
description: Makes tridents always channel lightning, even when its not thundering.
body:
Do you think that needing to wait hours for it to finally thunder is too annoying? well with this simple mod tridents that have the channeling enchantment will always channel lightning when it hits mobs or blocks!
  
  
![Image of a thrown trident entity hitting a lightning rod block and it becoming charged and lightning spawning.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ee4fb22844175819723d78486f3aa27ebebf9ac.jpeg)





Join the [Discord!](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d) You can ask for help, a mod, just suggest something, hangout or request the source code of any mod I have made (if I still have the source code)

Or donate to my [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/bikerboys) incase you are feeling generous!
